---
title: "Presentations"
toc: false
---

<style>
.presentation-video {
  width: 100%;
  margin: 1rem 0 0.25rem 0;
}

.presentation-video .ratio,
.presentation-video iframe {
  width: 100%;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.presentation-links {
  margin-top: 0.1rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.25rem;
}

.presentation-links p {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
</style>

Selected presentations, webinars, and recorded talks by members of our team.

### Milan Lstibůrek — Three methodological puzzles inspired by trees

Invited talk at the Animal Breeding and Genomics Group, Wageningen University & Research, March 26, 2026.

::: {.presentation-links}
[Download slides](../pdfs/presentations/Lstiburek_Wageningen_2026.pdf){target="_blank"}
:::

<div style="height: rem;"></div>

### Christi Sagariya — Impact of erroneous marker data on the accuracy of narrow-sense heritability

EvolTree FORGENIUS Conference, Madrid, Spain, November 18-21, 2025.

::: {.presentation-video}
{{< video https://youtu.be/caHO0O1UJ4s aspect-ratio="16x9" >}}
:::

<div style="height: 2rem;"></div>

### David Chludil — Pollen-based assisted migration

EvolTree FORGENIUS Conference, Madrid, Spain, November 18-21, 2025.

::: {.presentation-video}
{{< video https://youtu.be/tzQ1k5LrGyk aspect-ratio="16x9" >}}
:::

<div style="height: 2rem;"></div>

### Milan Lstibůrek — A dynamic breeding framework for bridging local adaptation and assisted migration

IUFRO WG 2.02.05 webinar held on September 25, 2025.

::: {.presentation-video}
{{< video https://youtu.be/F0xmYv-CnWY aspect-ratio="16x9" >}}
:::

<div style="height: 2rem;"></div>

### Milan Lstibůrek — Rolling-Front Landscape Breeding

IUFRO WG 2.02.05 webinar held on September 25, 2025.

::: {.presentation-video}
{{< video https://youtu.be/d8sZXV3X4N8 aspect-ratio="16x9" >}}
:::

::: {.presentation-links}
[Download slides](../pdfs/presentations/lstiburek_iufro_2025.pdf){target="_blank"}
:::
